name: National Merit Excellence Scholarship
description: Awarded to high-achieving undergraduate students across all disciplines who demonstrate consistent academic excellence.

name: Women in STEM Grant
description: Supports women pursuing science, technology, engineering, or mathematics degrees.

name: Economically Weaker Section (EWS) Support Fund
description: Financial assistance for students from economically weaker sections to continue higher education.

name: Kerala State Higher Education Scholarship
description: State-sponsored scholarship for students studying in Kerala with good academic standing.

name: SC/ST Community Upliftment Scholarship
description: Reserved scholarship supporting students from SC/ST communities pursuing undergraduate or postgraduate studies.

name: Engineering Talent Scholarship
description: For students enrolled in engineering programs with strong academic performance.

name: First Generation Learner Scholarship
description: Supports students who are the first in their family to pursue higher education.

name: Tamil Nadu Merit Scholarship
description: Merit-based scholarship for students studying within Tamil Nadu.

name: Minority Community Education Grant
description: Financial aid for students belonging to recognized minority communities.

name: Postgraduate Research Fellowship
description: Fellowship supporting postgraduate students engaged in research-oriented coursework.

name: Karnataka Student Aid Program
description: State assistance program for students residing and studying in Karnataka.

name: Differently Abled Student Support Scholarship
description: Dedicated financial support for differently abled students pursuing higher studies.
